item.title: Maybe there is a lesson there?
item.dc:creator: CaptainBackPain

item.title: It's a terrible day for rain...
item.description: When I was young, my parents taught me to be kind and compassionate, to love my neighbors, to think for myself, and to stand up for what's right. In time we grew apart. They were religious and as I aged I became agnostic. Using the values they taught me I became left leaning while they watched Fox News. However, when a gunman showed up to his church today and started shooting, the first thing he did was get my nieces and nephews to safety. The next thing he did was run right back inside to save whoever else he could find. The gunman found my father, shot him, poured gasoline over his corpse and set him on fire. The only mercy being he was dead before the fire was lit. I know this because my sister was there as she had run back into the building with him to help. The gunman let her go after forcing her to swear she worshiped Jesus and not Joseph Smith three times. Whatever shortcomings my father may have had in life, in the end, when it mattered, he was the man I remembered as a child. He laid down his life for the people around him. Greater love hath no man than this. He lived up to his values as a Christian. He lived up to my dreams as a child who idolized his father. He lived up to the basic decency that seems so absent in this day and age. I couldn't be prouder of him. I'll miss you, Dad.
item.dc:creator: DrBlackJack

item.title: Rule #1: Cardio
item.description:
I'm going on Saturday to run my second 12 hour race except my gender category will be different this year. I think of these kind of races as training for if I ever have to, say, walk from where I live to the border of the country for some reason. It's just over 200 miles from where I live. I'm hoping to cover 40+ miles in 12 hours. I don't hate that I know this stuff, I hate that I have to have these plans.
I love you all. We will get through this if we help each other.
item.dc:creator: SharkLove

This setup cost more than some real cars.
The way they camouflage the painting with real life.
Helicopter ground handling unit (GHU).
Opening a Dam's Gate That's Been Shut For Years.
There's a football stadium (Cierny Balog) in Slovakia, with live railway line crossing it.
First time these twins locked eyes.
Traveling chess.
For those who appreciate the finer things.
Cleaning up the mess.
Face your fears

item.title: Couch Boy Calls Jon Favreau (Host Of Pod Save America) A Dipshit – The Podcaster Issues A Rebuttal
item.description: Favreau co-hosts Crooked's premier political podcast Pod Save America with Dan Pfeiffer, Vietor and Lovett. In the wake of the new Republican healthcare bill, the AHCA, he coined the term "Wealthcare". Jon was also the former director of speechwriting for President Barack Obama.
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: A Rarely (if ever) filmed 3-dimensional circling school of Cownose Rays. Clearwater, Florida
item.description: I was really psyched to have captured this mesmerizing moment. I couldn't find a single video on the internet of a school (aka fever) of Cownose Rays circling like this. And I've only seen it once even though I've filmed millions of Cownose Rays. The 3 dimensional school was circling on a horizontal plane and also on a vertical plane as you can see some of the rays from the bottom making their way to the top. I took the video near Clearwater, Florida. When rays are circling like this in a tight formation and close together it's typically because there's a shark nearby. If cownose rays are circling but are much more spread out then they are probably just recalibrating their GPS systems to figure out where they are. All of the pics and videos I post are taken by me. For more OC nature vids check my profile or look for See Through Canoe Company on YouTube, BlueSky, FB & other social media sites.
item.dc:creator: SeeThroughCanoe

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1489 (cat domestication)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
This woman is literally a saint in the Orthodox church, and I love her. She also literally told off the Emperor, too, at one point. There's also a great song about her by Frank Turner: https://youtu.be/eDe2snHUnSY?si=WFL52GEkUqMxHYk8
Indeed.
In case you were wondering where current evidence suggests that cats were domesticated.
aaaaaa
Yeaaah.
Microvenator vs. Sauroposeidon.
Cheese for everyone!
I do have one set of Ötzi tattoos. Ice mummy take the wheel.
This parrot is out of control.
This is why I do it.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Glory. Step up?" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: A Living Legend
item.description: Source: officialtimcurry on Instagram Edit: For those unaware, Mr. Curry suffered a major stroke in 2012 and has been in a wheelchair since. Per his Instagram and IMDb (https://www.imdb.com/name/nm0000347/) pages, he's still keeping busy doing voice work and, in 2025, celebrating the 50th anniversary of The Rocky Horror Picture Show.
item.dc:creator: ConsummateConundrum

item.title: GovBrief Today #241
item.description: ? Federal troops and agents are now in Chicago and Portland with Memphis next. DC and LA were practice runs. Their bosses are emboldened. A Border Patrol commander bragged his agents arrest people based on "how they look" while tactical teams swept Michigan Avenue. Trump called Portland war-ravaged to justify the deployment. Masked federal agents have grabbed DC residents for six weeks straight just for looking Latino. Armed federal occupation of American cities has begun, and anyone remaining quiet is complicit. If your local and state leaders are silent, call or write them today and demand they publicly condemn this behavior. Don't leave truth to the algorithm. Our free and private nightly email arms you with images, data, and quotes so you can see it all for yourself. Add your email at govbrief dot today or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com [1] https://go.govbrief.today/missouri-gerrymandered-map-signed [2] https://go.govbrief.today/national-guard-portland [3] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-ai-medbed-video [4] https://go.govbrief.today/energy-dept-climate-words [5] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-military-meeting-tuesday [6] https://go.govbrief.today/border-agents-chicago [7] https://go.govbrief.today/michigan
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Numb to death
item.description: Swear I’m just numb to death at this point. Knew it was coming. Got to say goodbye a few weeks back but wasn’t there for his passing in hospice. Yelled I love you to him on speaker. He passed a few hours later. We weren’t close while I was growing up, but at least I got to know him as an adult. Just feels weird that both my parents are gone, and I’m getting another tumor removed from my spine in 6 days and more radiation treatment to follow. I’m only 33 years old. Like tf did I do in a past life to deserve the shit end of the stick like this?
item.dc:creator: therealsarahconnor
